title: bouteloua nervata
intro: Bouteloua nervata, also known as blue grama grass, is a type of perennial grass native to the Great Plains of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bouteloua nervata include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Bouteloua nervata include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
